name: Bernie Sanders
subject: We just won Indiana!
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Moments ago the news networks declared us the winner of yet another state - our 18th of the primary season: Indiana.
For the past several weeks, the corporate media has counted us out of this election. The political and financial establishment of this country have been vocal in their desire for us to go away. To get in line.
Today, the voters had another idea.
**Every victory we earn is extraordinarily important for our political revolution.** Not just because of the delegates we earn, but because each win and all the work that goes into that effort sends an unmistakable message to the establishment of this country that we will never stop fighting for the values we share. I say we keep fighting. Are you with me?
[**Your $2.70 contribution to our campaign sends a powerful message that we will fight for the values we share all the way through the Democratic convention and beyond.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/indiana-victory?refcode=em160503 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/indiana-victory?refcode=em160503")
The next states up are West Virginia, Kentucky and Oregon. They are all places we have a chance to do very well. I am in this fight through the Democratic convention. Thank you for standing with me.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/indiana-victory?refcode=em160503 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/indiana-victory?refcode=em160503")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

Not just because of the delegates we earn, but because each win and all the work that goes into that effort sends an unmistakable message to the establishment of this country that we will never stop fighting for the values we share. name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Clinton campaign thinks this is over. They are wrong
body:
#
The Clinton campaign thinks this campaign is over, sisters and brothers.
They are wrong.
**Maybe it's over for the insiders and the party establishment, but the voters in Indiana had a different idea.** The campaign wasn't over for them. It isn't over for the voters in West Virginia. It isn't over for Democrats in Oregon, New Jersey and Kentucky. It isn't over for voters in California and all the other states with contests still to come.
I understand we have an uphill climb to victory, but we have been fighting uphill from the first day of this campaign. I am in this campaign until the last vote is cast, and that's why I have to ask:
[**We have received over 50,000 contributions in the last 12 hours. Your $2.70 donation right now will ensure we have the resources to fight and win through the remaining states and all the way to the Democratic Convention.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/indiana-win?refcode=em160504-s1-sub-bsc "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/indiana-win?refcode=em160504-s1-sub-bsc")
Last night Donald Trump became the presumptive nominee of the Republican Party. Poll after poll shows we are the best campaign to take him on, and by a wide margin. There is nothing more I would like than to take on defeat Donald Trump, someone who can never become president of this country. And that is why we must continue to fight for the values we share, and to win this primary.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/indiana-win?refcode=em160504-s1-sub-bsc "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/indiana-win?refcode=em160504-s1-sub-bsc")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Official McGinty Campaign
subject: It’s over
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1073019874357280768/-6016786012422799360?refcode=e20160504&refcode2=e20160504a&amount=25)
---
It's over, friend. Donald Trump is the presumptive Republican nominee for president.

As scary as Trump is, this is an incredible opportunity for Democrats. Trump has a 69% disapproval rating among Americans and virtually every poll has him losing to a Democrat.

**That means we could put a strong Democrat in the White House this year AND end Republicans ' control of Congress -- including taking back the Senate majority!**

But we'll have to fight for it. **We need you NOW to take advantage of this opportunity:**

[**Friend, will you chip in to help Katie beat Pat Toomey, take back the Senate for Democrats, and work with a Democratic president to pass the progressive policies that Americans need?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1073019874357280768/-6016786012422799360?refcode=e20160504&refcode2=e20160504a&amount=25)

Thank you,

Official McGinty Campaign
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1073019874357280768/-6016786012422799360?refcode=e20160504&refcode2=e20160504a&amount=25)
---

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: I don't know how else to say this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors
body:
This is real | Friend --

It would have been unimaginable a year ago, but after last night, it's inevitable: Donald Trump will be the Republican nominee for president.

Donald. Trump.

I don't know how else to say it: The whole world is counting on us to win this thing. And we owe it to them to step up.

**Please give today and let's start defeating Donald Trump right away (when you do -- we’ll send you a free sticker to say thank you):** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU0MDQzMjIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNzE4MDIyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Michael Tyler, RussFeingold.com
subject: The Koch brothers are back
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
The Koch brothers are playing fast and loose with the facts. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4294/1c469400/505b8b5/35620d3/943289230/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-ad?utm_source=ema_2016-05-04_rr_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-04_rr_nd&utm_campaign=rr&utm_medium=ema") Friend, They're back. The Koch brothers just launched an attack ad backed by $2 million attacking Russ's record of fighting for our veterans. This attack ad is utterly and completely false -- but it's a convenient way to prop up the Koch brothers' "model legislator" whose record supporting veterans is one of the worst in the country. Here are the facts. Will you help us spread these far and wide? **[Pitch in $5 to our Rapid Response Fund today so we can respond to these attacks:](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4294/1c469400/505b8b5/35620d3/943289230/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-ad?utm_source=ema_2016-05-04_rr_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-04_rr_nd&utm_campaign=rr&utm_medium=ema")** | | **Senator Johnson's Veterans Record**
* One of only three senators to vote against a bill to help veterans get timely care

* Voted against expanding federal veterans benefits, including job training and education assistance

* Voted against legislation to expand job training and education assistance to veterans

* Supports partially privatizing veterans care, something veterans advocacy groups resoundingly oppose

---
We know why the Koch brothers stepped in: to attack Russ and distract the people of Wisconsin from Ron Johnson's failed record.
**But the Koch brothers will stop at nothing -- including playing fast and loose with the facts -- to buy this election for their "model legislator," Senator Ron Johnson.**
**[Unlike the Koch brothers, our grassroots team can't shell out $2 million at the drop of a hat. But, if each of Russ's supporters pitches in $5 to our Rapid Response Fund, we can keep our positive ads up on the air longer.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4294/1c469400/505b8b5/35620d3/943289230/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-ad?utm_source=ema_2016-05-04_rr_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-04_rr_nd&utm_campaign=rr&utm_medium=ema")**
_Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_
| [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4294/1c469400/505b8b5/35620d0/943289230/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-ad?utm_source=ema_2016-05-04_rr_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-04_rr_nd&utm_campaign=rr&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
| | [$25 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4294/1c469400/505b8b5/35620d1/943289230/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-ad?utm_source=ema_2016-05-04_rr_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-04_rr_nd&utm_campaign=rr&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$100 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4294/1c469400/505b8b5/35620ce/943289230/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-ad?utm_source=ema_2016-05-04_rr_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-04_rr_nd&utm_campaign=rr&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| | [Other »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4294/1c469400/505b8b5/35620cf/943289230/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-ad?utm_source=ema_2016-05-04_rr_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-04_rr_nd&utm_campaign=rr&utm_medium=ema&express_lane_other")
---
I'm not surprised that the Koch brothers would stoop so low as to politicize the tragic deaths of veterans ... but, we're six months out from Election Day, and the nasty attacks are only going to get worse from here.
Thanks for chipping in to support our Rapid Response Fund.
Michael Tyler
Communications Director
[CONTRIBUTE »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4294/1c469400/505b8b5/35620d3/943289230/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-ad?utm_source=ema_2016-05-04_rr_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-04_rr_nd&utm_campaign=rr&utm_medium=ema")

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Donald Trump is now the presumptive Republican nominee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors
body:
If Trump wins the White House Friend --

This is really happening -- last night, Ted Cruz, the final Republican who had a fighting chance of stopping Donald Trump, dropped out of the race. And John Kasich's campaign is saying he'll drop out later today, too.

Trump is going to be the Republican nominee. And if he wins the White House, he could erect a wall on the Mexican border, put women in jail for having abortions, and ban Muslims from coming to our country -- and those are just some of the ideas we know about so far.

16 Republicans tried and failed to stop Trump -- now it’s up to us.

**Are you in? Your donation is about more than money. It’s your way of saying you’re ready to fight like hell to make sure Donald Trump never becomes president (and when you make your first donation today, we’ll send you a free sticker so you can show off your Team Hillary pride):**
[ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU0MDY3MjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNzMzMjI4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU0MDY3MjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNzMzMjI4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Christina

Deputy Communications Director
Hillary for America

clean_body: If Trump wins the White House Friend -- This is really happening -- last night, Ted Cruz, the final Republican who had a fighting chance of stopping Donald Trump, dropped out of the race. And John Kasich's campaign is saying he'll drop out later today, too. Trump is going to be the Republican nominee. And if he wins the White House, he could erect a wall on the Mexican border, put women in jail for having abortions, and ban Muslims from coming to our country -- and those are just some of the ideas we know about so far. 16 Republicans tried and failed to stop Trump -- now it’s up to us. Are you in? Your donation is about more than money. It’s your way of saying you’re ready to fight like hell to make sure Donald Trump never becomes president (and when you make your first donation today, we’ll send you a free sticker so you can show off your Team Hillary pride): --- ]() Thank you, Christina Christina Reynolds Deputy Communications Director Hillary for America Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her: | --- ]() | Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors. Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

name: Team Murphy
subject: even worse than President Trump:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae23f3/738133e4/354ef31e/7f825181/2251464595/VEsH/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com/landing/e160504/?subsource=ngpattre160504")
---
| Friends, we didn't believe this day would really come, but here we are: **Donald Trump is the presumptive Republican nominee for President.**

Given his racist, uninformed, and out of line positions, a President Trump would be horrifying. But you know what would be _even worse?_ **President Trump with a Republican Senate to rubber stamp his every demand.** A wall on our border with Mexico? Punishing women for getting an abortion? A ban on Muslims entering the country? **We CAN'T let it happen.** We need your help right away. [**Will you add your name and stand with us to stop Trump, win in Florida, and turn the Senate blue again?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae23f3/738133e4/354ef31e/7f825181/2251464595/VEsE/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com/landing/e160504/?subsource=ngpattre160504")

Thanks,

Team Murphy |

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: re: Donald Trump is now the presumptive Republican nominee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
We can't risk a Trump presidency | Friend --

Last night, Donald Trump effectively locked up the Republican nomination for president.

When I imagine him in the White House, I'm disgusted. Not just because of the policies he'd enact -- a ban on Muslims entering the country, punishment for women who get abortions, a wall on the border in Mexico -- but also because I try and imagine him doing the more symbolic, but often just as powerful, parts of the president's job.

I just can't imagine him mourning with the country after a mass shooting, or comforting us after a natural disaster. There is no version of Trump we've seen that would ever encourage a little girl to dream bigger. He’d never feel like it’s on him to demonstrate to kids that learning can be cool.

Donald Trump can't be our next president. We can't risk it -- Hillary and this team are the only people who can stop him.

**Join the more than 1.2 million donors who are standing strong against Trump -- chip in $1 today and claim your free Team Hillary sticker:**
[ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU0MTA0NTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNzY0NzQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU0MTA0NTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNzY0NzQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Christina

Christina Reynolds
Deputy Communications Director
Hillary for America

**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU0MTA0NTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNzY0NzQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU0MTA0NTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNzY0NzQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
